title: False Edge in Prediction Markets: Portability Lessons from Polymarket and Kalshi
question: What survives public scrutiny when prediction-market edge claims are forced through leakage review, venue portability, and execution realism?
audience: Potential employers in quant, energy trading, market operations, and research-oriented software roles

evidence_policy.kalshi-research: portability failure and data limitations only
evidence_policy.kalshi-favorites-selector: methods/system design and explicit no-trading scope only
